title: Expand commons spec with best practices research

log.context: Expand commons spec with best practices research

The spec has been rewritten and expanded. Here's a summary of what was added:

**Section 5 — Player Consistency (new, ~600 words)**
- Full client-side prediction algorithm with input sequence numbers and a typed `PendingInput` buffer
- Reconciliation pseudocode: how to discard acknowledged inputs, replay pending ones, and arrive at a corrected present position
- Snap vs. smooth correction: 8px threshold — under 8px blends over 3 frames, over 8px hard-snaps
- Server-side speed validation formula ...(truncated)
